summary: Add dry-run-first stack pin updates with compatibility checks and rollback
description: Add dry-run-first stack pin updates with compatibility checks and rollback
acceptance: go stack update plans an immutable version change without writing by default
Apply updates required_stack_version and stack_ref transactionally and records rollback data
Invalid, missing, or incompatible refs are rejected before project state changes

evidence.summary: 62 pytest tests, make check, and diff check passed; stack update dry-run leaves project and updates directory untouched; apply verifies tag commit, declared runtime version, and contract compatibility before atomic write; rollback record contains before/after state; missing and mismatched tags fail before mutation.
